pageContext.name: Alligator Loki Zippermouth
pageContext.description: Burdened with Glorious Cuteness  Alligator Loki of Marvel Studios' Disney+ series Loki may look like a carnivorous reptile - which he definitely is - but he's also an intelligent variant of the God of Mischief himself.   Our 12-inch long Alligator Loki Zippermouth™ Premium Plush features his green scales and iconic gold crown. Unzip the God of Mischief's mouth, and a presidential Loki button is exposed. Wonder where he got that?  Like all of our Zippermouths™, Alligator Loki is a sculptural plush. He's stitched with great precision using top-quality materials and designed to hold his shape no matter how many neighborhood cats he eats.
